bits.premise: Armadillos classified as Mexican turtles opens a logical path to a Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles crossover with Mexican characters.
Smoke detector low-battery chirping is a racially targeted conspiracy: the battery never actually dies, it just torments Black households.

lines.text: -Uh, armadillos are just Mexican turtles.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: [ Laughter ]
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I thought that's what the word "armadillo" means.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: 'Cause I've been trying to create some secret ooze
lines.label: tag

lines.text: to turn these niggas into
lines.label: tag

lines.text: teenage mutant ninja Mexican turtles.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You don't even gotta change the name.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: You know what I'm saying?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's just Rafael Leonardo, Michael,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: but I'm Master Splinter.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Now that I got y'all in a silly thing,
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I gotta get to some beef that I got.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Fuck the nigga who made the low battery noise
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and smoke detectors.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Nigga, how the fuck?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I got so many white friends that move next door to me,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: they smoke detector, don't never go off.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: But when my black ass family move in,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that shit be on for 15 years.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Nigga, either kill yourself or not.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I hate a battery that don't actually wanna die.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: But then I know it's a conspiracy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They turn us into sleeper agents.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: They want us to be ghetto.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Because in 2001, I opened up the smoke detector,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and if y'all remember, Doris L used to be able
lines.label: setup

lines.text: to have these buttons that you could press
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and see how much energy was left in the battery.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Nigga, it was full.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I'm done, I'm such a shit so bad.
lines.label: fluff
